import React from "react"; import { LinearGradient } from "expo-linear-gradient"; export default function WhySection({ onOpenDemo }) { return (
{/* Background */}
{/* Header */}

Why CineGate

Public film licensing redesigned for African cinema.

{/* Cards */}
{/* Left */}

Public screenings{"\n"}are complicated

  • › Licensing is unclear
  • › Negotiations are slow
  • › Many venues screen films informally
{/* Center (emphasized) */}

Pay once.{"\n"} Screen once.

  • › Download licensed film
  • › Screen it one time
  • › Access automatically expires
{/* Right */}

More African films{"\n"}on more screens

  • › Legal access for venues
  • › Revenue for filmmakers
  • › Cultural visibility globally
{/* CTA */}

Experience the one-time screening model

{/* Responsive: 3 cols -> 1 col */}
); } const S = { section: { position: "relative", padding: "78px 18px 96px", overflow: "hidden", color: "#fff", backgroundColor: "#050505", fontFamily: 'Montserrat, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif', }, // ✅ background should be visible (mockup is bright) bg: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, backgroundImage: "url(/assets/why_section_bg.png)", backgroundSize: "cover", backgroundPosition: "center", transform: "scale(1.03)", filter: "saturate(1.08) contrast(1.02) brightness(1.08)", }, // ✅ lighter overlay than your current version overlay: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, background: "radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(0,0,0,0.06) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.34) 62%, rgba(0,0,0,0.52) 100%)", }, vignetteTop: { position: "absolute", left: 0, right: 0, top: 0, height: 160, background: "linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,0.62), rgba(0,0,0,0))", }, vignetteBottom: { position: "absolute", left: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, height: 240, background: "linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.68), rgba(0,0,0,0))", }, container: { position: "relative", zIndex: 2, maxWidth: 1120, margin: "0 auto", textAlign: "center", }, h2: { margin: 0, fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 56, letterSpacing: "-0.6px", }, sub: { marginTop: 10, marginBottom: 0, fontSize: 18, opacity: 0.75, }, grid: { marginTop: 34, display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr))", gap: 26, alignItems: "stretch", }, // ✅ thin orange glow outline (mockup) cardWrap: { borderRadius: 14, padding: 1, background: "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(240,154,43,0.22) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.06) 60%, rgba(240,154,43,0.10) 100%)", boxShadow: "0 16px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, // ✅ center is only slightly stronger cardWrapHot: { boxShadow: "0 20px 70px rgba(240,154,43,0.10), 0 16px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, // ✅ transparent card so background texture shows (like mockup) card: { height: "100%", borderRadius: 14, padding: "28px 22px 24px", background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.18)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", textAlign: "center", }, // subtle warm tint (not solid fill) cardHot: { background: "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(240,154,43,0.10) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.14) 45%, rgba(0,0,0,0.18) 100%)", border: "1px solid rgba(240,154,43,0.16)", }, icon: { width: 64, height: 64, objectFit: "contain", marginBottom: 14, filter: "drop-shadow(0 10px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.55))", }, cardTitle: { margin: 0, fontSize: 26, fontWeight: 800, lineHeight: 1.15, whiteSpace: "pre-line", }, orange: { color: "#F09A2B" }, rule: { height: 1, width: "86%", margin: "18px auto 0", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", }, ruleHot: { background: "rgba(240,154,43,0.20)", }, ul: { margin: "16px auto 0", padding: 0, listStyle: "none", textAlign: "left", maxWidth: 340, }, li: { display: "flex", gap: 12, alignItems: "flex-start", padding: "12px 0", fontSize: 18, opacity: 0.85, borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)", }, bullet: { color: "#F09A2B", fontWeight: 900, marginTop: 2, }, ctaHint: { marginTop: 36, marginBottom: 16, fontSize: 18, opacity: 0.65, }, btnOuter: { border: 0, padding: 0, background: "transparent", cursor: "pointer", borderRadius: 12, boxShadow: "0 16px 36px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", display: "inline-block", }, btn: { position: "relative", borderRadius: 12, padding: "16px 28px", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18)", display: "inline-flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 14, overflow: "hidden", }, btnGloss: { position: "absolute", left: 1, right: 1, top: 1, height: 18, borderTopLeftRadius: 12, borderTopRightRadius: 12, backgroundColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.14)", }, play: { color: "#fff", fontWeight: 900, fontSize: 22, position: "relative" }, btnText: { color: "#fff", fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 24, letterSpacing: "0.2px", position: "relative", }, };
